positive: A vibrant, stylized tropical jungle scene centered on a majestic, glowing bioluminescent orchid and large fern fronds. The composition should feature clean, stylized silhouettes and high contrast between deep indigo backgrounds and vibrant neon emerald, electric magenta, and cyan accents. Include various geometric leaf patterns and abstract crystalline bioluminescent details. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau fluidity and modern synthwave vaporwave aesthetic, suitable for repeating textile patterns. Perfect for a central-composition apparel print with thick lines and sharp edges. Dramatic rim lighting, highly detailed, vector illustration quality.
